title: Deshfinop
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''''Deshfinops''''' were large, leathery-winged [[Mammal/Legends|mammalian]] pests native to a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] disputed by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and the [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] forces of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Inos Fonada]]. Following the defection of one of Fonada's trooper detachments, [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Sandrex Olotho]] devised an unorthodox means for her and the remaining loyal troopers to escape. By capturing several ''deshfinops'', coating them with a slow-burning resin, and releasing them, she sowed confusion among the defector's ranks and set fires in their encampment. The disorganization that resulted allowed Olotho and her followers to escape.

==Sources==
